title: Search | Depop
memory: The previous search for "iphone 15 pro 256gb" returned zero results, so I am documenting the page based on the "Browse Depop" recommendations instead. I've noted the grid format and identified some filter categories, but I need to extract specific item titles and all sorting/filter options to complete the documentation.

extract.query: Document the Depop search results page: 1. Confirm listing display format (grid/list). 2. Describe where prices and titles are located relative to the image. 3. List the first 5 items from the 'Browse Depop' section with their titles (descriptions) and prices. 4. List all available filter buttons and the sorting button name. 5. Describe any visible popups or promotional banners.
